description: Golden examples for rendering harness_quality/v1 in Hermes Agent chat surfaces. These fixtures are deterministic local contracts.

examples.user_visible_upgrade: The wrapper can show that a coding handoff is ready while still saying execution, review, CI, and merge evidence are not observed yet.
examples.claim_boundary: Prepared handoff is not implementation evidence.

examples.user_visible_upgrade: The wrapper can render accept/revise/cancel states from the same plan contract instead of asking the user to know workflow commands.
examples.claim_boundary: A draft plan is not execution or review evidence.

examples.user_visible_upgrade: The wrapper can keep research as a first-class Hermes lane and avoid turning every source-backed answer into a coding handoff.
examples.claim_boundary: Research synthesis is not implementation evidence.

examples.user_visible_upgrade: The wrapper can ask one blocking question in-thread, then rerun planning only after the answer is available.
examples.claim_boundary: A clarification question is not a plan approval.
